creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Comment on attachment 165186
update firefox and firefox-i18n to 43.0.4

Looks OK but don't forget about linux- variant. ENOTIME to land today.

  # After bumping DISTVERSION run to avoid regressing USE_LINUX=f10 support
  $ make makesum create-plist clean WANT_GTK218= -C www/linux-firefox
